Title: Boy
Writer: Peter Gantzler, Iben Gylling, Nynne Oldenburg
Actors: Sebastian Jessen, Marie Louise Wille, Helle Merete Sørensen
Plot: 18-year old Christian has just graduated from high school. At his summer job he is seduced by the 36-year old single mother Sanne. Soon he is drawn into a world of sensuality and his acquaintance with Sanne turns into an intense love affair which forces Christian to deal with his newly discovered sides.
